case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. PASCUAL ALBERTO UC BAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED SEP-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UC BAN, PASCUAL ALBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS--COSTUMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UC BAN, PASCUAL ALBERTO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UC BAN, PASCUAL ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
